nodes.name: check_bowl_game_weeks.py
nodes.summary: Diagnostic script that fetches postseason games from CFBD API and reports bowl game week numbers to debug import issues.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Fetches postseason games, categorizes them into bowl/playoff/conference-championship buckets, and prints week number analysis.

nodes.name: debug_championships.py
nodes.summary: Debug script that compares CFBD API championship game results with and without the classification=fbs filter to diagnose filtering issues.

nodes.name: debug_championships
nodes.summary: Runs two API queries for championship weeks (with and without FBS classification filter) and reports discrepancies.

nodes.name: diagnose_missing_games.py
nodes.summary: Diagnostic script that checks game availability by team for specified weeks, flagging missing games that may be FCS opponents.

nodes.name: check_team_games
nodes.summary: Queries CFBD week-by-week for a specific team's games and prints completion status and summary.

nodes.name: import_real_data.py
nodes.summary: Core data import orchestrator that fetches teams, regular-season games, conference championships, bowl games, playoff games, and AP Poll rankings from CFBD and writes them to the database while processing ELO ratings.

nodes.name: import_teams
nodes.summary: Imports FBS teams with recruiting, talent, returning production, and transfer portal data; creates or updates team records and initializes ELO ratings.

nodes.name: import_conference_championships
nodes.summary: Fetches weeks 14-15 from CFBD, filters for conference championship games, creates or updates game records with quarter scores, and processes ELO.

nodes.name: import_bowl_games
nodes.summary: Fetches postseason games, filters out conference championships and CFP games, imports bowl games with quarter scores, and processes ELO.

nodes.name: import_playoff_games
nodes.summary: Fetches postseason games, identifies CFP playoff games by keyword, assigns week numbers by round, and imports with ELO processing.

nodes.name: import_ap_poll_rankings
nodes.summary: Fetches AP Poll data for a specific week and upserts APPollRanking records in the database.

nodes.name: parse_game_date
nodes.summary: Parses ISO 8601 startDate from CFBD API response, returning None for missing dates rather than a fallback timestamp.

nodes.name: validate_api_connection
nodes.summary: Tests CFBD API connectivity by fetching teams and reporting success or failure.

nodes.name: check_for_duplicates
nodes.summary: Queries the database for game records sharing the same home/away team, week, and season to detect duplicate imports.

nodes.name: validate_import_results
nodes.summary: Runs duplicate detection, verifies game counts, and prints an import validation summary report.

nodes.name: get_or_create_fcs_team
nodes.summary: Returns or creates an FCS team placeholder with is_fcs=True and a zeroed ELO rating.

nodes.name: backfill_quarter_scores.py
nodes.summary: Backfills missing quarter scores (q1–q4) for existing game records by fetching line scores from CFBD, with dry-run and batch commit support.

nodes.name: QuarterScoreBackfiller
nodes.summary: Encapsulates the backfill workflow: queries games with NULL quarter scores, fetches line scores from CFBD, validates and commits results, and reports statistics.

nodes.name: get_games_needing_backfill
nodes.summary: Queries Game records where q1_home IS NULL, optionally filtered by season and limited in count.

nodes.name: backfill_game
nodes.summary: Fetches line scores for a single game from CFBD, updates the Game model, validates quarter totals, and commits unless in dry-run mode.

nodes.name: run
nodes.summary: Orchestrates the full backfill loop with rate-limiting sleep, batch commits, and final summary.

nodes.name: check_week11_api.py
nodes.summary: Diagnostic script that inspects CFBD Week 11 API data to debug current-week detection, checking both camelCase and snake_case score field names.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Calls get_current_week and get_games for week 11, categorizes games as completed or upcoming, and prints field-name inspection results.

nodes.name: debug_cfbd_response.py
nodes.summary: Minimal debug script that fetches week 10 games and pretty-prints the raw JSON response structure for the first three games.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Fetches week 10 regular-season games and dumps full JSON for the first three to stdout for API response inspection.

nodes.name: import_ap_poll_only.py
nodes.summary: Standalone script to import AP Poll rankings for specified weeks without touching game data or resetting the database.

nodes.name: import_ap_poll_for_week
nodes.summary: Fetches AP Poll data for a single week and upserts APPollRanking records, matching teams by name.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Interactive entry point that auto-detects season/week, accepts user input for range, and iterates import_ap_poll_for_week.

nodes.name: test_cfbd_data.py
nodes.summary: Quick smoke-test script that checks CFBD data availability for weeks 8-15 of the 2025 season.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Loops over weeks 8-15, calls get_games for each, and reports game count or error.

nodes.name: update_games.py
nodes.summary: Incremental game import script that adds new games for specified weeks without resetting the database, creating FCS team placeholders as needed.

nodes.name: update_games
nodes.summary: Iterates over weeks, fetches games from CFBD, creates FCS placeholders, skips duplicates, fetches quarter scores for completed games, and writes new Game records.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Interactive entry point that auto-detects season/week, prompts for start/end weeks, and calls update_games.

nodes.name: weekly_update.py
nodes.summary: Weekly cron orchestrator that performs pre-flight checks (active season, current week detection, API quota) before running import_real_data.py in incremental mode.

nodes.name: is_active_season
nodes.summary: Returns True if today falls within the active CFB season window (August through configured season end date).

nodes.name: check_api_usage
nodes.summary: Returns True if monthly CFBD API usage is below 90% threshold, logging a critical message if exceeded.

nodes.name: get_current_week_wrapper
nodes.summary: Wraps CFBDClient.get_current_week with logging and exception handling for the weekly update pre-flight check.

nodes.name: validate_week_number
nodes.summary: Validates that a week number falls within 0-19 (covers preseason through CFP), returning False and logging errors for out-of-range values.

nodes.name: update_current_week
nodes.summary: Queries the max week among processed games and updates Season.current_week in the database as a redundancy measure.

nodes.name: run_import_script
nodes.summary: Executes import_real_data.py as a subprocess in incremental mode with a 30-minute timeout, returning the exit code.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Entry point that sequences three pre-flight checks then calls run_import_script and update_current_week on success.

nodes.name: cfbd_client.py
nodes.summary: CFBD API client providing methods to fetch teams, games, recruiting, transfer portal, AP Poll, and quarter-by-quarter line scores, with automatic usage tracking and quota monitoring.

nodes.name: CFBDClient
nodes.summary: HTTP client for CollegeFootballData.com API covering teams, games, recruiting rankings, player data, transfer portal, AP Poll, and line scores; uses Bearer token auth and @track_api_usage decorator.

nodes.name: track_api_usage
nodes.summary: Decorator that logs every API call to the api_usage table with endpoint, timestamp, status code, and response time, then checks warning thresholds.

nodes.name: get_monthly_usage
nodes.summary: Returns a dict of API call count, monthly limit, percentage used, remaining calls, average per day, and top endpoints for a given month.

nodes.name: check_usage_warnings
nodes.summary: Logs critical/warning messages at 80/90/95% thresholds, suppressing duplicate warnings per month.

nodes.name: get_season_end_date
nodes.summary: Reads CFB_SEASON_END_DATE env var (default Feb 1) and returns (month, day) tuple for season boundary calculations.

nodes.name: get_current_season
nodes.summary: Determines the current CFB season year based on calendar date and the configured season end date, accounting for the January playoff period.

nodes.name: get_current_week
nodes.summary: Fetches all regular-season games and returns the highest week number that has completed (non-null, non-0-0) scores.

nodes.name: estimate_current_week
nodes.summary: Fallback calendar-based week estimator using weeks elapsed since the first Saturday after Labor Day.

nodes.name: get_teams
nodes.summary: Fetches all FBS teams for a given season year from the /teams/fbs endpoint.

nodes.name: get_games
nodes.summary: Fetches games from the /games endpoint with optional week, team, season type, and classification filters.

nodes.name: get_recruiting_rankings
nodes.summary: Fetches team-level 247Sports composite recruiting rankings for a class year from /recruiting/teams.

nodes.name: get_recruiting_players
nodes.summary: Fetches individual player recruiting data (stars, rating, ranking, position) from /recruiting/players, returning an empty list on API failure.

nodes.name: get_team_talent
nodes.summary: Fetches team talent composite scores from the /talent endpoint.

nodes.name: get_returning_production
nodes.summary: Fetches returning production percentages (percentPPA) from the /player/returning endpoint.

nodes.name: get_transfer_portal
nodes.summary: Fetches transfer portal entries from the /player/portal endpoint.

nodes.name: get_ap_poll
nodes.summary: Fetches rankings from /rankings, filters to AP Top 25 poll entries, and returns a flat list of team ranking dicts.

nodes.name: get_game_line_scores
nodes.summary: Fetches quarter-by-quarter line scores from /games/teams, matches the specific game by team names, and returns {home: [q1,q2,q3,q4], away: [q1,q2,q3,q4]} or None.

nodes.name: compare_rankings.py
nodes.summary: Utility that compares ELO rankings against the AP Poll, analyzes prediction accuracy, and displays ELO insights such as biggest rating changes and strength of schedule leaders.

nodes.name: compare_with_ap_poll
nodes.summary: Fetches ELO rankings and compares them to a hardcoded AP Poll reference, computing exact matches and average positional difference.

nodes.name: analyze_prediction_accuracy
nodes.summary: Queries all processed games and measures how often ELO correctly predicted the winner, listing biggest upsets.

nodes.name: show_elo_insights
nodes.summary: Displays biggest ELO rating gainers/decliners and strength-of-schedule leaders from current rankings.

nodes.name: import_player_data.py
nodes.summary: Script to import individual player recruiting data from CFBD for all FBS teams or a single team, with API quota checks, dry-run mode, and upsert logic.

nodes.name: check_api_quota
nodes.summary: Estimates API calls needed (~133 for full FBS import) and warns if projected usage would exceed 90% of the monthly quota.

nodes.name: import_players_for_team
nodes.summary: Fetches player recruiting data for one team and upserts Player records in the database, committing in batches of 100.

nodes.name: import_all_teams
nodes.summary: Iterates over all FBS teams in the database and calls import_players_for_team for each, with rate-limit sleep between teams.

nodes.name: verify_import
nodes.summary: Queries total player count and teams with players for a given recruiting year, then prints the top 5 recruits by ranking.
